sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the abdomen & pelvis acquired without intravenous contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Liver (size, contour, focal lesion; in trauma: AAST 2018 grade, laceration depth, haematoma, active extravasation vs contained vascular injury): 
Gallbladder and biliary tree: 
Pancreas (duct, peripancreatic fluid): 
Spleen (in trauma: AAST 2018 grade, laceration/haematoma, pseudoaneurysm or active extravasation): 
Adrenals: 
Kidneys and ureters (in trauma: AAST 2018 grade, collecting-system/pedicle injury, devascularisation): 
Bowel and appendix: 
Bladder: 
Pelvic organs (uterus/adnexa or prostate/seminal vesicles): 
Peritoneum / free fluid (haemoperitoneum volume and location) / free air: 
Vasculature and lymph nodes: 
Skeleton and body wall:

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bulleted impression. Lead with the highest-grade solid-organ injury (AAST 2018 grade for spleen/liver/kidney) and state explicitly whether active extravasation or a contained vascular injury (pseudoaneurysm/AV fistula) is present, then haemoperitoneum burden and other significant findings; escalate via the critical-result pathway for active bleeding or high-grade injury, and close with approved follow-up phrasing only.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
